LanguageData.VV_Command_CollectScentDesc: Select a flower to record its scent. {0} slots remain.
LanguageData.VV_Command_SprayPerfumeDesc: Scatter perfume powder over all flesh creatures within {0} tiles. {1} uses remain.
LanguageData.VV_Command_ReloadPerfumeBottleDesc: Spend {0} {1} to prepare the empty bottle for another blend.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_NoArcaneEffect: Ordinary flowers add a pleasant fragrance but no arcane effect.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_CannotCollectState: This perfume bottle cannot collect another scent in its current state.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_MustBeWorn: The perfume bottle must be worn to use it.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_InvalidFlower: This target does not have a scent that the bottle can record.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_FlowerTooYoung: This flower must reach 70% growth before its scent can be collected.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_FlowerUnreachable: The flower is forbidden, reserved, or unreachable.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_EmberBloom: Emberbloom warmth improves cold tolerance; concentrated blends also aid immunity.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_FrostBloom: Frostbloom coolness improves heat tolerance; concentrated blends slow fatigue.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Shockerbud: Flashbud sparks sharpen dodging; concentrated blends quicken movement.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Thunderpetals: Thunderpetal energy improves work speed; concentrated blends accelerate learning.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Waterdrops: Waterdrop freshness aids immunity; concentrated blends slow fatigue.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Radiantflower: Radiantflower light improves learning; concentrated blends heighten psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Richflower: Richflower abundance improves work speed; concentrated blends especially aid plant work.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Purifimint: Purifimint freshness resists toxic environments; concentrated blends also resist toxin buildup.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Starlitflower: Starlitflower fragrance heightens psychic sensitivity; concentrated blends slow fatigue.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Skyweed: Skyweed fragrance quickens movement; concentrated blends shorten aiming time.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Everflower: Everflower resonance heightens psychic sensitivity, then improves learning and protection at high concentrations.
